name: River Style Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet over high heat and sauté the bacon until crispy. Remove from the skillet with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Add the chili ground beef to the same skillet and cook over high heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until browned.
3. Add the onion and garlic; stir and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes until softened.
4. Stir in the dried oregano, cumin, hot chile powder, and dried mushrooms.
5. Pour in the canned crushed tomatoes, kidney beans (with liquid), and liquid hot pepper sauce. Stir to combine.
6. Add boiling water until the mixture reaches a simmer. Reduce heat to low and stir in the kosher salt and black pepper.
7. Simmer for 1-1/2 to 2-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
